name: Toddler Dinosaur Kids' Comforter - Pillowfort™: Multicolor, Cotton, Polyester Fill, OEKO-TEX Certified, 58"x42"
description: Add some fun, prehistoric charm to your child's bedroom with the Toddler Dinosaur Comforter from Pillowfort™. The comforter features a vibrant print of various dinosaurs roaming in a woodland against a solid white backdrop that brings a dash of fun flair to their room.  The 100% cotton shell ensures soft, comfortable year-round use, while the cozy comforter with polyester fill adds a layer of warmth to the top of their bed. Add solid sheets and other bedding pieces to complete their bedding ensemble, and machine wash for easy care.
